title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cisco India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Cisco India
jsonLd.description:
Cisco India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Cisco India:
Cisco India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cisco India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
